field_values.action_summary: Dorothy and the Lion lead a search party across a rocky plain, discovering the rusted Tin Woodman. They bring him back to the castle where Winkie tinsmiths spend three days repairing his body with patches.
field_values.emotional_beat: From desperation/worry to relief and gratitude.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots of desolate rocky plain; Close-ups of rusted, battered Tin Woodman; Montage/Time-lapse coverage of tinsmiths working
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Progression of rust levels on tin_woodman
Specific placement and appearance of metal patches post-repair
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH013_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the scale of the desolate rocky plain through a search party movement, transitioning into an intimate workshop setting to showcase communal repair work. The sequence must visually communicate the passage of time and the physical restoration of the Tin Woodman from a rusted state to a patched but functional state.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- cowardly_lion
- tin_woodman
- winkies

## Required Environments
- rocky_plain
- yellow_castle (workshop area)

## Continuity Constraints
- Progression of rust levels on tin_woodman
- Specific placement and appearance of metal patches post-repair

## Beat List
- BT001: Search party traverses the rocky plain
- BT002: Discovery of the rusted Tin Woodman
- BT003: Communal repair montage
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
